title: Psammogonum articulatum
intro: I couldn't find any information on the plant Psammogonum articulatum. However, I was able to find some information on the plant Psammogonetum (which seems to be an older name for) Psammogonetum articulatum (also known as Psammogonum articulatum is actually an older name) and then later as (Psammogonum) articulatum is an older name of 'Psammogonum salsugineum' then another option is 'Psammogonum calycinum'.
